subject: Warp tunnel drops when switching from hardline to station-wide mesh comms
description: Every time I undock my bridge terminal and move to station-wide mesh comms, the warp tunnel disconnects and I have to reconnect manually. Started after last Tuesday’s ShipOS update. Using WarpShield v3.2 on the Alpha Station mesh, Deck 4. I’d file this under ‘mildly infuriating’ except last time it happened I was mid-transmission to Station Epsilon and they got half a cargo manifest spliced with half of Lt. Mehta’s personal log. Commander Kapoor was NOT amused.

subject: SubComm crashes and holographic calendar shows phantom briefings from 2024
description: Two problems since getting a new workstation console yesterday: (1) SubComm shows a white screen then crashes on launch — tried restarting twice. Even did the old ‘vent atmosphere and re-pressurize’ trick (kidding, but I considered it). (2) SubComm calendar is showing mission briefings from 2024 I deleted months ago — including one labeled ‘Emergency: Deck 9 Cat Containment Protocol’ which was resolved when Exobiology caught all six escapees. Both started right after the console swap. Might be related, might not.

subject: Holographic projector offline in Main War Room — delegation arriving in 25 minutes
description: The holographic projector in the Main War Room won’t power on. Tried the neural interface and the manual override panel. The Meridian Sector delegation arrives in ~25 minutes for the final treaty review on a critical deep-space mining pact worth 2.3M credits — our Fleet Admiral is presenting the tactical overlay. No backup chamber fits 12 species representatives (especially not with the Rigelian ambassador’s atmospheric requirements). Can someone beam over immediately?

subject: URGENT — everything is down!!!
description: Nothing works. I cant access anything. My console is just spinning like a pulsar. Please fix Aflight navigation system i have deadlines today and my commanding deckr is already asking for the deliverable. The nutrient synthesizer on this deck is ALSO broken — it keeps dispensing lime-flavored protein cubes no matter what I select — but thats probably a different division. EVERYTHING IS DOWN.

subject: Re: [Signal SIG-0847] Scheduled maintenance notification
description:
Thank you for letting me know. I will be in cryo-sleep from March 24-28 with limited access to subspace messages. For urgent matters, please contact my colleague Alex at alex.wu@cdss.space.

Safe travels through the void,
Priya Sharma
Director of Payload Management

subject: Suspicious access attempt attempts on my BioScan ID — someone from Tau Ceti sector
description: Got 6 sign-in alert transmissions this morning — someone tried to authenticate against my BioScan ID from the Tau Ceti relay station. I haven’t left the station in months. Changed my biometric passphrase already but worried the crew account may already be compromised. I have confidential diplomatic treaties and classified sensor archives in my personal data vault on Station Core. Should I be concerned about data exfiltration?

subject: Nightly telemetry pipeline failing — service identity 403 against Deep Storage Array
description: Automated pipeline ‘prod-sensor-ingest’ failing since 03:00 UTC with 403 Forbidden on the Deep Storage Array in Sector Gamma. Service principal token may have expired or the Telemetry Data Contributor access role got revoked during last week’s station security audit. Feeds the anomaly detection model used for the Monday Admiral’s briefing. Pipeline runs on Station Core cluster sector-eastus2, rg-telemetry-prod. Last successful run Saturday 03:00 UTC.

subject: Low priority — minor database hiccup, probably fine
description: Hey team. The production crew database on Station Core has been returning timeout errors for 2 hours. ~40% of data requests to the crew management portal are failing with 500 errors. Crew members are seeing intermittent errors accessing their duty rosters and mission assignments. SentinelGrid dashboard shows connection pool exhaustion on the primary data node. Marked as low priority since the backup node is still handling some traffic. Let me know when you get a chance. I mean, some crew can’t see their EVA schedules and might accidentally spacewalk into an asteroid field, but the backup node is handling SOME load, so... probably fine?

subject: Re: SIG-2834 — Airlock access code still broken, Deck 7
description: Following up on SIG-2834 from last week. Airlock access code still doesn’t work for Deck 7 after the access system migration. Was told it’d be fixed by Friday — it’s Monday and I still can’t get in. Have to wait for someone to cycle the airlock every morning. Third time reporting this.

subject: New crew member March 31 — full setup needed
description:
New senior astro-data scientist (Alex Rivera) arriving on station March 31. Needs:
- Workstation console (Quantum Pro M4, 32GB)
- Standard software + Python/Conda/Jupyter
- Station Core ML workspace access (rg-ml-prod)
- Sensor catalog read access
- Deck 3 airlock access code
- Added to analytics-team DL and SubComm channel

Reports to me. Please have everything ready by March 28 for a walkthrough.

subject: BioScan biometric verification not working on my communicator
description: I’m getting a new code error every time I try to approve the BioScan biometric verification prompt on my personal communicator. The Authenticator app shows the push notification but when I tap Approve it says ‘Something went wrong’. Tried deleting and re-adding the crew account in the app, same result. I can still authenticate using backup codes but that’s slower. Not super urgent, just annoying.

subject: FYI — Stellar nav console holographic display flickering during solar flare
description: Holographic display connected to my stellar navigation console started flickering around 10am. It’s not constant — happens for a few seconds every 5-10 minutes. I switched the data cable to a different port and it still does it. Nav data itself seems fine, readings are updating. Just the display. Also, unrelated — can you check if my FlightOS license is still active? I got an expiry warning transmission last week but I can still authenticate.

subject: Potential containment breach — immediate attention needed
description: During a routine compliance audit, we discovered that a mission log archive containing PII for ~1,200 crew members on the Deck Gamma Outpost was shared externally with ‘Anyone with the link’ permissions. The archive has been accessible since at least stardate February 15. We’ve revoked the sharing link as of this morning but need to determine: (1) who created the public link, (2) whether external parties accessed the data, and (3) whether this triggers a notification obligation under Galactic Data Protection guidelines. This is a potential regulatory incident.

subject: thanks!
description: got it working, appreciate the quick turnaround. you folks are the best!! 🎉

subject: Slight delay in probe deployment — may be nothing
description: Noticing about a 200ms delay in probe deployment commands on the APAC sector this morning. Normally we’re at ~50ms. Volume looks normal. Latency seems to spike right around 09:00 SGT and hasn’t recovered. Not sure if it’s our side or the relay station. The navigators haven’t complained yet but if this gets to 500ms during the Europa shift we’ll have a real problem. Just flagging early.

subject: FlightOS won’t load after passphrase rotation
description: Changed my station passphrase this morning per the quarterly rotation policy. Now FlightOS GUI gives me ‘unified crew authentication token invalid — contact your system administrator’. Tried logging out and back in to the station console, same issue. Other apps (SubComm, mission logs) work fine. I need FlightOS to process month-end resource reconciliation — close of shift today is the deadline.

subject: Emergency beacon call — crew member having issues with something
description:
[Transcribed from emergency beacon call, 3:42 PM]

Caller: Hi yeah so um my thing... the thing on my console... it keeps doing the... you know when you click on it and it goes to the... [static] ...and then nothing happens? I’ve been trying for like two days. My colleague Janet said to hail you folks. I think it might be the... [static] ...something about permissions? I don’t know. Can someone just come look at it? I’m on Deck 5, near the mess hall. My name’s Bob. No wait, Robert. Robert Chen. Not the Robert Chen in Resource Allocation, the other one.

subject: Fleet Admiral Martinez can’t share screen in command briefing — happening now
description: Carlos Martinez (Fleet Admiral, Deep Space Operations) is in the command briefing right now and can’t share his screen over SubComm. The meeting is with the admiralty board and allied fleet commanders. He’s tried sharing from both his workstation console and the war room’s SubComm device. Other participants can share fine. His console shows ‘Sharing is blocked by your station’s policy.’ Briefing has been going on for 10 minutes without his tactical display. He’s asking for someone to come to Deck 8 command war room immediately.

subject: Crew member offboarding — last duty day March 21
description:
Jessica Palmer (jessica.palmer@cdss.space) in the Threat Detection team has resigned her commission. Her last duty day is Friday March 21. Please:
- Disable her BioScan ID crew account at 6 PM EST on March 21
- Revoke warp tunnel and all remote access
- Wipe her station console (Quantum Latitude 5540, asset tag CT-L-4892)
- Transfer ownership of her data vault and mission log files to her commanding deckr David Liu (david.liu@cdss.space)
- Remove her from all comm channels and SubComm groups
- Archive her message archive per our 7-year retention policy

Note: Jessica has access to sensitive threat investigation files. Please ensure these are preserved but not accessible after her departure.

subject: Molecular fabricator on Deck 3 not working
description: The large molecular fabricator near the mess hall on Deck 3 stopped fabricating. Jobs go to the queue but nothing materializes. I tried from my console and from the workstation next to it — same result. The fabricator display shows ‘Ready’ and material hoppers are full. Other crew on the deck are having the same issue. We need it for diplomatic gift packages that ship out today.

subject: How do I book a briefing room?
description: Hi, I just arrived on station last week and I need to book the large briefing room on Deck 4 for a crew gathering on Friday. I looked in SubComm but I can’t figure out how to reserve it. Is there a special calendar or something? Also, do I need to order catering through Station Operations or is that a different team? Thanks!

subject: quantum cert expiring on crew-api.cdss.space — 3 days left
description: Our holographic displaying flagged that the quantum encryption certificate on crew-api.cdss.space expires on March 20. This is the production API gateway that all external fleet integrations hit. If the cert expires, every fleet connection will start failing with TLS errors. The cert was originally provisioned manually by someone who transferred off-station 6 months ago. I don’t know if auto-renewal was ever configured. We need to renew or replace it before Thursday.

subject: I think my workstation console has a virus
description: My workstation console has been super slow for two days. Programs take forever to open, the cooling fans run constantly, and I got a couple of weird pop-ups that said something about ‘updating system components.’ I think I might have caught a virus from that subspace message I accidentally opened last week. I ran SentinelGrid and it didn’t find anything but I’m still worried. Should I not use the console until someone checks it?

subject: Fwd: You have won 5,000,000 galactic credits — claim now!!!
description:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Intergalactic Prize Committee <claims@totallylegit-prizes.ng>
Date: March 16, 2026
Subject: You have won 5,000,000 galactic credits — claim now!!!

Dear Valued Crew Member,

Congratulations! Your subspace address has been selected as the winner of our annual Intergalactic Subspace Lottery. You have won the sum of 5,000,000 galactic credits.

To claim your prize, please click the link below and enter your full name, stardate of birth, and credit crew account details:
https://claim-your-prize-now.totallylegit-prizes.ng

--- end forwarded message ---

Hey Station Ops — got this transmission, is this legit? Should I click the link? Looks suspicious but I don’t want to miss out if it’s real.

subject: Station Core VM ‘prod-analytics-01’ unreachable since reboot
description: VM prod-analytics-01 (Standard_E16ds_v5, sector-eastus2, rg-analytics-prod) became unreachable after a scheduled reboot at 05:00 UTC for OS patching. Remote console and secure shell both timeout. Station Core portal shows the VM status as ‘Running’ but boot diagnostics show it stuck at ‘Applying station settings’. Firewall rules haven’t changed. This VM runs the analytics dashboard that the command staff uses for the morning briefing at 9 AM EST. We have about 2 hours.
